reviews.review_description: Found this game l on the store and I lowk fell in love with it
W game, good staff, the community is nice and respectful, everyone is welcome!!!
It’s just the plain map not even a game atp😭
It is the best fan game

Owner called me the n word soft a and hard r 10 times, owner called me a (i shall not repeat it but it has something to do with lgbtq+ and it starts with an f) & edited a screenshot of me saying to another person what he told ME to do, kill myself. WOULD NOT RECOMMEND IM SPEAKING THE TRUTH SO IF YOU PLAY THIS GAME YOU SHOULD KNOW ALL OF THIS THAT THE OWNER DID

developer_response.body: Guys I will take accountability for ALMOST EVERYTHING, But Lemme share my story, so it all started with mont in annc he wss sharing a yt about hitler and how he's nice and stuff and Then I argued about it and we all know hitler is bad, and he also screen shared of him watching po**, another thing is that he told me, Johnny, finn, and others to kill themselves and I had a big problem with it he might say he was joking. But he also told a guy with a black guy on a pfp and mont said your pfp looks like a slave and that was offensive to others also said the nword hard r and regular, I HAVE ALL PROOF JS DM ME ON META
